title: Warehouse shoulder strain during lifting
transcript: Hi, this is Evan Carter from Northline Distribution. I'm calling to report a workplace injury for workers compensation. Around 7:55 this morning I was lifting a palletized box in bay three and felt a sharp pull in my right shoulder. My supervisor, Dana, saw me stop working and helped document it. I can still move my arm but it hurts when I raise it above shoulder level. I have an urgent care visit scheduled this afternoon. Please call me back at 602-555-0184 so I can open the claim.
